agenda: Fish fry or cookout in spring and summer, college football tailgate with Diane in fall
Marcel's birthday.

topic: Annual physical with Dr. Paul Mitchell
agenda: Annual physical with Dr. Paul Mitchell. Coast Guard annual inspection of the Lucky Strike. ACA marketplace plan renewal.
Beau's birthday.
Diane's birthday.
Carlos's birthday.

topic: USCG Captain's License renewal packet submitted to the National Maritime Center
agenda: USCG Captain's License renewal packet submitted to the National Maritime Center (current license expires ).
Fall Music Festival, Bayport waterfront. Carlos sits in with the Harbor Ramblers on a two-song late-afternoon set.

topic: Guitar restoration delivery deadline for the 1960s Martin D-28 to a client in...
agenda: Guitar restoration delivery deadline for the 1960s Martin D-28 to a client in Tampa (pushed from June due to LMI bridge-plate sourcing).

topic: Charter season wind-down dinner at Captain Nolan Grant's
agenda: Charter season wind-down dinner at Captain Nolan Grant's. Bayport captains' annual tradition.
Halloween. Grandkids Elise and Beau trick-or-treat in Spring Hill, Carlos on candy duty at Luc and Ashley's.
Veterans Day. Carlos donates the fish fry to American Legion Post 99 in Brooksville (annual since 2017).
Diane's birthday weekend. Dinner at Riverside Bistro, Marcel comping the dessert course off the record.
Thanksgiving. Marcel cooks at the cottage by professional-kitchen privilege.

topic: Toys-for-Tots benefit jam at the Grace Community Church hall in Brooksville
agenda: Toys-for-Tots benefit jam at the Grace Community Church hall in Brooksville. Carlos sits in on two tunes and donates a refurbished student-grade acoustic.
Christmas. Luc and Ashley host at their Spring Hill home for the gift exchange and brunch.
Scheduled event
